api.apiRequestFailed: The interface request failed, please try again later!
api.apiTimeoutMessage: The interface request timed out, please refresh the page and try again!
api.errMsg401: The user does not have permission (token, user name, password error)!
api.errMsg403: The user is authorized, but access is forbidden!
api.errMsg404: Network request error, the resource was not found!
api.errMsg405: Network request error, request method not allowed!
api.errMsg500: Server error, please contact the administrator!
api.errMsg503: The service is unavailable, the server is temporarily overloaded or maintained!
api.errMsg505: The http version does not support the request!
api.errorMessage: The operation failed, the system is abnormal!
api.networkExceptionMsg: Please check if your network connection is normal! The network is abnormal
api.timeoutMessage: Login timed out, please log in again!

login.forgetFormSecondTitle: Please enter the email address associated with your account and We will email you a link to reset your password.
login.policy: I agree to the xxx Privacy Policy
login.registerAndAgree: By signing up, I agree to
login.scanSign: scanning the code to complete the login
login.signInDesc: Enter your personal details and get started!
login.signInFormDescription: Enter your username to login to your account

settings.stretchTip: Only available when the screen width is greater than 1280px (xl)
settings.title: Settings

workflowCache.quotaExceeded: Could not save results to browser storage — it may be full.

workbench.title: Brand actions
workbench.subtitle: Monitor conversations, understand sentiment, and prepare responses without technical setup.

shared.noAccounts: No response accounts found. Add accounts in Management > System > Accounts.

search.hint: Search Instagram by account usernames, hashtags, or post URLs. Add each value as a chip (Enter or comma); comments and sentiment are analyzed automatically.
search.keywordsPlaceholder: Enter a username, hashtag, or post URL, then Enter or comma…
search.chipCommitHint: Press Enter or comma to add a value. Paste comma- or line-separated lists.
search.maxPostsPerAccountLabel: Max posts per account or hashtag
search.streamProgressSubtitle: Each line is an update from the search service.

post.hint: Send approved comments to an Instagram post using the connected response accounts.
post.postModeSelfHint: Enter one comment per line; they will be posted as written.
post.postModeAiHint: Tone, count, and optional language steer how replies are generated before posting.
post.postStreamProgressSubtitle: Live steps while responses are posted.

autoReply.hint: Analyze a post, skip high-severity negatives, and reply to lower-severity negatives with selected response accounts.
autoReply.streamProgressSubtitle: Live steps from the auto-reply service.

campaign.hint: Find relevant posts, analyze sentiment, and publish approved responses in one guided workflow.

facebookSearch.hint: Unified Apify-backed Facebook search by account paths or post URLs. Add each value as a chip (Enter or comma).
facebookSearch.keywordsPlaceholder: Account path or post URL (depending on type below), then Enter or comma…
facebookSearch.chipCommitHint: Press Enter or comma to add a value. Paste comma- or line-separated lists.
facebookSearch.streamProgressSubtitle: Each line is an update from the Facebook search stream.

facebook.heavyHint: Review recent Facebook posts and audience sentiment. This can take 1-2 minutes per post.
facebook.fetchHint: Paste a Facebook post link to summarize its comments and sentiment.
facebook.postHint: Choose whether you write comments yourself or Brand Guard generates them, then publish.
facebook.postModeManualHint: Enter one comment per line. They will be posted as written.
facebook.postModeAutoHint: Suggested tone and count control how suggestions are generated.
facebook.accountStreamProgressSubtitle: Live steps while the page is analyzed.
facebook.fetchStreamProgressSubtitle: Live steps while comments are reviewed.
facebook.postStreamProgressSubtitle: Live steps while responses are published.

telegramSearch.title: Telegram search
telegramSearch.subtitle: Stream Telegram search against channels and keywords (comment API).
telegramSearch.hint: Add keywords and channels below. Each value is saved as a chip; you need at least one of each before running.
telegramSearch.keywordsPlaceholder: Enter a keyword, then Enter or comma…
telegramSearch.chipCommitHint: Press Enter or comma to add a value. Paste comma- or line-separated lists.
telegramSearch.includeCommentsHint: Fetches comments per matched post for sentiment around negative comment share.
telegramSearch.streamProgressSubtitle: Each line is an update from the Telegram search stream.

result.commentsNoneInPayload: Comments were requested — none returned in this payload.
result.aiAdviceZoneDisclaimer: The summary and recommendations below are produced automatically. Treat them as suggestions — verify facts and suitability before acting.

platformsSearch.title: Multi-platform search
platformsSearch.subtitle: Search Telegram channels plus linked Instagram and Facebook coverage in one stream (comment API).
platformsSearch.cardTitle: Find mentions across Telegram, Instagram, and Facebook
platformsSearch.hint: Uses your Telegram channels and keywords; Instagram and Facebook mirrors are matched by the unified service.
platformsSearch.keywordsPlaceholder: Enter a keyword, then Enter or comma…
platformsSearch.bilingualHint: When on, transliterations may be searched alongside your keywords.
platformsSearch.streamProgressSubtitle: Updates from the unified platforms search stream.
platformsSearch.noTelegramBlock: No Telegram block in this response yet.
platformsSearch.noInstagramPosts: No Instagram posts in this response.
platformsSearch.noFacebookPosts: No Facebook posts in this response.

result.totalPostsAllHint: Aggregate from Telegram, Instagram, and Facebook

analysis.title: Executive reports
analysis.subtitle: Turn comments into clear brand health, sentiment, and action reports.
analysis.fetchCardHint: Paste a post link to collect comments and create a sentiment report.
analysis.statsCardHint: Export saved comments as JSON or CSV for reporting.
analysis.statsEmpty: Enter a post URL and fetch or load stats.
analysis.commentsCardHint: Filter saved comments by sentiment and find what needs attention.
analysis.noRows: No rows parsed — raw payload below.
analysis.accountCardHint: Review recent posts and understand the overall audience mood.

commentApi.loadingDescription: This can take a few minutes. The result will stay cached when it finishes.
commentApi.readyDescription: Run the workflow above and Brand Guard will turn the response into a clear executive summary.
commentApi.noExecutiveSummary: There is no executive summary for this response yet. Open technical details below if needed.

i18nPage.body: English, Russian, and Uzbek are available. On the first visit the app uses your browser language when it matches a supported locale; otherwise English is used. After you pick a language, it is persisted in localStorage under the key {{key}}.
